subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the love of God, enraptured and joyous, in the festal chamber of love adorned, and in the celebration of knowledge arrayed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای باده محبه اللهک سرمست و سرخوشی بزم محبت آراسته در جشن معرفت پیراسته در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @symbolism, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @importance of prayer
